commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d992e27e7a408d72cc8e1dafb57906befeea9b46)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a device-auth mtime/size read cache, promise-caches session realpath resolution, parallelizes tracked temp-dir cleanup, and bounds iOS APNs registration reads.

Reproducibility: not applicable. for the original item because this is a performance/refactor PR, not a bug report. For the review finding, yes: source inspection shows the PR uses runTasksWithConcurrency in default continue mode, and that helper waits for workers before returning firstError.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is needed because the remaining blocker combines contributor proof gaps with an APNs delivery semantics change; automation cannot supply the contributor's real setup proof.

target.title: perf: reduce latency across async I/O hot paths
target.author: ynachiket

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
